prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河海大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约21007名、25723名、28680名、42087名、32966名。2021至2024年位次持续后移，累计后移约21080名 ，其中2024年出现异常大幅后移（较2023年后移13407名）；2025年位次大幅前移回升至32966名，较2024年前移9121名，反映出2024年位次异常后市场自我修正。近两年波动幅度 较大，2025年基准位次约32966名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年193人、2022年195人、2023年197人、2024年206人、2025年215人，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划223人，较2025年增加8人，扩幅约3.7%，扩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第6 0–65名区间（2026年约第63名），属于中上水平211高校，以水利工程为特色；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名第5 2位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度处于正常水平；第五轮学科评估中，水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程获评A，环境科学与工程获评A ，三个学科均为A-及以上，与该校招生专业中的水利类、土木工程、环境工程等直接对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，河海大学开设计算机科学与技术、软件工程、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业，有助于吸引高分考生；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约 72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；河海大学位于江苏省南京市 ，在山东省招生人数从2021年193人持续增至2026年223人，招生规模稳步扩大，体现对山东生源的重视；该校在江苏本省招生占比约20%–25%，山东为其重要生源省份之一。
8. 【预测结论】综合2025年位次大幅前移的修正趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+8人/+3.7%）、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳且优势学科突出等因素，考虑考生增幅大于扩招幅度的净竞争加剧效应，预测2026年最低录取位次约为33752名，较2025年小幅后移约786名；波动区间33252–34252名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hohai University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 21007, 25723, 28680, 42087, and 32966 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, the rankings continuously moved backward, accumulating a backward shift of about 21080 places, with an abnormal large backward shift in 2024 (13407 places behind 2023); in 2025, the ranking significantly moved forward to 32966, a forward shift of 9121 places compared to 2024, reflecting market self-correction after the abnormal ranking in 2024. The fluctuation range in the past two years is relatively large, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 32966; the enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Province comprehensive category was 193 in 2021, 195 in 2022, 197 in 2023, 206 in 2024, and 215 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 223, an increase of 8 from 2025, an expansion of about 3.7%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 60-65 range in recent years (approximately 63rd in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities, with water conservancy engineering as its specialty; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and the level of application attention is normal; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, water conservancy engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), civil engineering was rated A, and environmental science and engineering was rated A, all three disciplines being A- or above, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as water conservancy, civil engineering, and environmental engineering, which have strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly recommended; Hohai University offers popular majors like computer science and technology, software engineering, and electrical engineering and automation, which help attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and its enrollment in Shandong Province has steadily increased from 193 in 2021 to 223 in 2026, reflecting the importance placed on Shandong as a source of students; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province is about 20%-25%, with Shandong being one of its important source provinces.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the correction trend of the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+8 people/+3.7%), the increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% leading to intensified competition, the stable reputation of the university and its prominent advantageous disciplines, and the net competition intensification effect where the increase in candidates is greater than the expansion, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 33752, a slight backward shift of about 786 places compared to 2025; the fluctuation range is 33252-34252.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 33752, range 33252-34252. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction for application, Tier 1 majors (Dayu Strengthening Class, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc.) can be used as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors (Port, Waterway, Environment, Civil Engineering, etc.) as safe backups. Hohai University's water conservancy engineering is an A+ flagship discipline, and related majors (Water Conservancy, Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources, etc.) have outstanding disciplinary strength and strong employment relevance, worthy of attention. Popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity and fierce competition, requiring candidates to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
